curation_notes: Patch commit a79b65c adds bounds checks (count > xsize) to the expandrow and expandrow2 functions in src/libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. Locations derived directly from the patch diff and confirmed by the advisory description which names libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c. The pre-patch code at commit 93b22b8 has the file at src/libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c.
